company: Public Service Electric and Gas Company
source: New Jersey Board of Public Utilities
source_note: Order Adopting Initial Decision and Stipulation in the petition of Public Service Electric and Gas Company (PSE&G) for an increase in electric and gas base rates, NJ BPU Docket Nos. ER23120924 (electric) and GR23120925 (gas) / OAL PUC 00926-24, issued at the October 9, 2024 agenda meeting. Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF on the BPU board-orders host www.nj.gov/bpu/pdf/boardorders/2024/20241009/; docket system: publicaccess.bpu.state.nj.us (Imperva-protected — the static board-order PDF is the fetched source).

source: New Jersey Board of Public Utilities
source_note: Decision and Order Adopting Initial Decision and Stipulation on the verified petition of Jersey Central Power & Light Company (JCP&L) for increases in its electric rates (2023 base-rate filing), NJ BPU Docket No. ER23030144 / OAL PUC 3346-23, issued at the February 14, 2024 agenda meeting. Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF on the BPU board-orders host www.nj.gov/bpu/pdf/boardorders/2024/20240214/; docket system: publicaccess.bpu.state.nj.us.

company: New Jersey electric distribution utilities (ACE, JCP&L, PSE&G, Rockland Electric)
source: New Jersey Board of Public Utilities
source_note: Decision and Order approving the auction process for Basic Generation Service (BGS) for the period beginning June 1, 2026 — the statewide descending-clock procurement that sets default-supply prices for Atlantic City Electric, JCP&L, PSE&G, and Rockland Electric customers, NJ BPU Docket No. ER25040190, issued at the November 21, 2025 agenda meeting. Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF on the BPU energy/BGS host www.nj.gov/bpu/pdf/energy/bgs/; docket system: publicaccess.bpu.state.nj.us.

source: New Jersey Board of Public Utilities
source_note: Order on Rate Mitigation Filing of Atlantic City Electric Company (ACE / Exelon), issued at the June 18, 2025 agenda meeting. Rate mitigation filing in response to elevated wholesale electricity costs from PJM markets following July 2024 auctions. Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF on the BPU board-orders host www.nj.gov/bpu/pdf/boardorders/2025/20250618/; docket system: publicaccess.bpu.state.nj.us.
